arg.name: params_file
arg.description: Full path to the DWB ROS 2 parameters file.

arg.name: global_frame
arg.description: Nav2 global frame. The Dreamer map is published in odom.

arg.name: robot_base_frame
arg.description: Robot base TF frame. Override to base_link if the simulator uses base_link.

arg.name: scan_topic
arg.description: Laser scan topic consumed by Nav2.

arg.name: goal_topic
arg.description: PoseStamped topic accepted by Nav2 BT navigator.

arg.name: cmd_vel_topic
arg.description: Final smoothed velocity command topic for go2_controller.
